title: agrostis castellana var. mutica
intro: Agrostis castellana var. mutica, also known as Castilian bent grass, is a type of grass native to the Iberian Peninsula in Europe. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is said to provide various health benefits, such as soothing digestive issues and reducing inflammation in the body. In herbal preparations, Agrostis castellana var. mutica is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
